title: Alchemia
description: A more interesting way to make potions! Based on Potion Craft Alchemy Simulator.
body:
# Alchemia

**Alchemia** is a Minecraft Forge 1.18.2 mod that changes potion crafting by introducing an array of new ingredients and innovative brewing mechanics. Inspired by *Potion Craft: Alchemy Simulator*.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qQUz4A-fDoA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features

- **New Potion Ingredients**
  - **Flowers**
  - **Herbs**
  - **Roots**
  - **Mushrooms**
  - **Crystals**

- **Natural Resource Discovery**
  - Find new ingredients naturally in the world.
  - Harvest ingredients to extract seeds, allowing you to farm them—though some require specific environmental conditions.

- **Alchemical Cauldron Mechanics**
  - Convert a standard cauldron into an **Alchemical Cauldron** by placing it on a campfire.
  - The cauldron collects available potion effects and displays them on a radial map.
  - Each ingredient added shifts the cauldron’s bias in a specific direction. With enough bias, the water changes color to match the potion effect.
  - Right-click with a glass bottle to 'bottle' the potion—each full cauldron yields four bottles.

- **Dynamic Potion Crafting**
  - Craft potions with multiple effects. The last effect added is generally the strongest.
  - Navigate the radial map to select your desired potion effect based on your ingredient combinations.

## Development Status

- **Alpha Stage:**  
  Alchemia is currently in the alpha stage, so expect many changes and updates as we continue to develop and refine the mod.
  
- **Community Contributions:**  
  We welcome assistance, especially with artistic and visual aspects.

## Future Updates

- **Version Expansion:**  
  Updates for versions above 1.18.2 are planned, though progress may be gradual.

## Get Involved
Your feedback and contributions are vital to improving the experience of Alchemia.
Join us in reimagining alchemy in Minecraft!

Happy Crafting,  
*Muddykat*
